top_signals.title: What is Pickaxe Mountain, the Iranian nuclear facility Trump is threatening to strike?
top_signals.summary: "We'll be hitting that area pretty soon, and very heavily," President Donald Trump said about Iran's underground nuclear facility in Pickaxe Mountain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wetherspoons warns on profit again as costs and tax bill swell
top_signals.summary: JD Wetherspoon has issued its second profit warning in three months as it grapples with a surge in food and energy costs and a rising business rates bill.  Tim Martin, founder and chairman of the UK’s best-known pub chain, said: “Profits for the year are likely to be below market expectations, with marginally lower sales [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DNI nominee Clayton wins Senate panel’s approval
top_signals.summary: By a party-line vote, the Senate Intelligence Committee sent the nomination of Jay Clayton to lead ODNI to the Senate floor.
